sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Primo Brands Corporation (PRMB)
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay & Murray LLP reminds investors of the January 12, 2026 deadline to file as a lead plaintiff in a class action lawsuit against Primo Brands Corporation (PRMB). The lawsuit alleges the company made misleading statements regarding its merger integration, supply disruptions, and financial prospects, which led to significant stock price drops following two separate announcements in 2025. Investors who suffered losses after purchasing Primo Water common stock between June 17, 2024, and November 8, 2024, or Primo Brands common stock between November 11, 2024, and November 6, 2025, are urged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Have $2,000? 3 Top Robotics Stocks to Buy and Hold for at Least a Decade
feed.summary: The article recommends three top robotics stocks – Intuitive Surgical, Medtronic, and Teradyne – for investors looking to capitalize on the high-growth robotics industry. Intuitive Surgical is highlighted for its leadership in surgical robotics with its da Vinci system, Medtronic for its Hugo system making inroads in robot-assisted surgery, and Teradyne for its strong semiconductor test business and growing robotics segment. These companies offer significant growth potential due to factors like AI integration, labor shortages, and expanding applications of robotics in healthcare, logistics, and manufacturing.

feed.title: “Conagra (CAG)’s Quarter Was Just Okay,” Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer commented that Conagra Brands, Inc. (NYSE:CAG)'s latest quarter was "just okay," attributing flat revenues to high beef prices. Following its second-quarter earnings report, RBC Capital and Evercore ISI reduced Conagra's share price targets, citing transient problems and turmoil in its frozen food business. Goldman Sachs also cut its share price target and maintained a Sell rating, while Cramer suggested that some AI stocks offer greater promise than traditional investments like Conagra.
